text: "Fritters and chili sauce on a white plate."
original_texts: A white rectangular plate is filled with crispy cabbage and carrot fritters, arranged neatly. A small white dish containing chili sauce is placed beside the fritters.

text: A wooden cutting board sits on a kitchen counter with a carrot, a cabbage, and two empty glass bowls nearby. A hand peels and slices the carrot into thick pieces, then chops them into thin strips, transferring them to a bowl. The cabbage is cut in half; one half is placed on the board and sliced into thin shreds, which are put into the second bowl. The remaining cabbage half is also shredded and added to the bowl.
original_texts: A wooden cutting board is placed on a kitchen counter with a carrot, a cabbage, and two empty glass bowls beside it.
A hand peels the carrot using a peeler, with the peels collected on a white plate.
The carrot is sliced into thick pieces on the cutting board.
The hand chops the carrot slices into thin strips and places them into one of the empty bowls.
A cabbage is cut in half and one half is placed on the cutting board.
The hand slices the cabbage into thin shreds.
The shredded cabbage is transferred into the second empty bowl.
The remaining half of the cabbage is also shredded and added to the bowl.

text: 3/4 Cup Flour
Ingredients are neatly arranged on a table: flour, chopped cabbage, chopped carrots, water, an egg, and a small dish of salt.
"Flour added."
original_texts: Hands add flour to a large mixing bowl.

text: 1 tsp salt
"Salt added to flour."
original_texts: Salt is added to the flour in the mixing bowl.

text: 1 egg
"Egg cracked into flour."
original_texts: An egg is cracked and added to the flour mixture.

text:
3/4 cup water
Add gradually
Water is slowly added while stirring until a smooth dough forms.
original_texts: Water is gradually poured into the mixture while stirring.
The mixture is stirred until it forms a smooth dough.

text: 3/4 cup cabbage
Cabbage is mixed into the dough.
original_texts: Chopped cabbage is added to the dough and mixed in.

text: 1/2 cup carrot
Carrots are chopped, added to the dough, and mixed thoroughly.
original_texts: Chopped carrots are added to the dough and mixed well.

text: Fry both side till golden brown
A bowl with cabbage and carrot mixture is beside a pan filled with hot oil on a stovetop.
A hand using chopsticks picks up a portion of the vegetable mixture.
The vegetable mixture is placed into the hot oil, starting to fry.
"Chopsticks drop cabbage and carrot mix into hot oil, frying until golden brown. The fritters are flipped, then lifted out, and set on a paper-lined plate, revealing their crispy texture."
original_texts: A hand uses chopsticks to place a spoonful of cabbage and carrot mixture into hot oil in a pan.
The mixture starts to fry, with bubbles forming around it in the oil.
A hand with decorated nails uses chopsticks to adjust the fritters, ensuring even frying.
The fritters turn golden brown as they continue to fry in the oil.
The hand flips the fritters to fry the other side until they are evenly golden.
The fritters are lifted out of the oil using chopsticks, showing a crispy texture.
The fritters are placed on a paper-lined plate to drain excess oil.
A close-up of the golden, crispy fritters on the paper-lined plate.

text: "Golden fritters with chili sauce on a white plate."
original_texts: A plate of crispy cabbage and carrot fritters is displayed on a white plate. The fritters are golden brown and arranged neatly. A small square dish of red chili sauce is placed on the plate beside the fritters.

text:
Thank you for watching
Please subscribe for more videos
A close-up of golden brown cabbage and carrot fritters on a white plate, accompanied by a small square dish of red chili sauce.
